description: Exercise animation plan for BridgeRecovery. Each exercise gets 72 SVG frames (400x300, 24fps) via scripts/generate.js.

exercises.name: Hamstring Slide
exercises.label: Slide heel along floor
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, slide heel along floor, return
exercises.description: Lie on back with knees bent. Slide right heel forward along floor until leg is straight, then slide back.
exercises.ghost: starting position with both knees bent, feet on floor
exercises.active: right leg slides forward and back; left leg stays bent; arrow follows sliding foot
exercises.motionHint: Knee extends as foot slides forward along floor; hip and upper body stay put

exercises.name: Bridge
exercises.label: Lift hips toward ceiling
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, lift hips up, hold, lower
exercises.description: Lie on back with knees bent, feet on floor. Lift hips toward ceiling, hold briefly, then lower.
exercises.ghost: starting position lying flat, knees bent, feet on floor
exercises.active: hips lift and lower; arrow points upward showing lift direction
exercises.motionHint: Hips lift vertically toward ceiling; spine arches; feet stay planted

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.label: Arch and round spine
exercises.instruction: On hands and knees, alternate arching/rounding spine
exercises.description: On hands and knees. Alternate between arching back upward (cat) and letting belly sink (cow).
exercises.ghost: neutral all-fours position, hands under shoulders, knees under hips
exercises.active: spine smoothly oscillates between arch and round using sin curve
exercises.motionHint: Spine smoothly oscillates between arch (cow, belly drops) and round (cat, back lifts)

exercises.name: Dead Bugs
exercises.label: Extend opposite arm and leg
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, extend opposite arm & leg toward floor
exercises.description: Lie on back with arms toward ceiling and legs in tabletop. Extend right arm back and left leg forward toward floor, then return.
exercises.ghost: starting position on back, arms up toward ceiling, legs in tabletop
exercises.active: right arm extends back toward floor, left leg extends forward toward floor, opposite limbs stay
exercises.motionHint: Right arm extends back behind head while left leg extends forward; both move toward floor

exercises.name: Clamshells
exercises.label: Open top knee like a clamshell
exercises.instruction: Lie on side, keep feet together, open top knee
exercises.description: Lie on side with legs stacked and bent. Keep feet touching while opening top knee upward like a clamshell.
exercises.ghost: starting position on side, legs stacked and bent at ~45 degrees
exercises.active: top knee opens upward, bottom leg stays, arc shows knee path
exercises.motionHint: Top knee rotates upward and forward like a clamshell opening; feet stay together

exercises.name: Prone Hamstring Curls
exercises.label: Curl heel toward glute
exercises.instruction: Lie face down, curl heel toward glute, return
exercises.ghost: lying face down, legs extended straight back
exercises.active: one heel curls toward glute, knee bends, then returns
exercises.description: Lie face down with legs extended straight. Curl one heel toward the glute by bending the knee, then slowly lower it back down with control.
exercises.motionHint: Knee bends, heel curls toward glute; thigh stays on floor

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring Curls
exercises.label: Curl heel toward glute
exercises.instruction: Stand on one leg, curl opposite heel toward glute
exercises.ghost: standing upright, both legs straight
exercises.active: one knee bends, heel curls toward glute, then lowers
exercises.description: Stand tall on one leg for support. Bend the opposite knee to curl the heel toward the glute, then lower with control. Keep torso upright and core engaged.
exercises.motionHint: Standing on one leg; opposite knee bends, heel curls to glute; torso stays upright

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.label: Hip hinge forward
exercises.instruction: Hip hinge forward with slight knee bend, return
exercises.ghost: standing upright, legs straight, arms at sides
exercises.active: torso hinges forward at hips, arms hang down, slight knee bend, return
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width and a slight soft knee bend. Hinge at the hips by pushing the butt back while lowering the torso and letting the arms hang toward the floor. Keep the back flat and neutral, then drive the hips forward to return to standing.
exercises.motionHint: Hip hinge: torso lowers forward with slight knee bend; arms hang straight down

exercises.name: Good Mornings
exercises.label: Hip hinge with hands behind head
exercises.instruction: Hands behind head, hip hinge forward until torso parallel to floor
exercises.description: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width. Place hands behind head, hinge at hips to lower torso toward parallel with floor while keeping back straight, then return to upright.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, hands behind head
exercises.active: torso hinges forward at hips until parallel to floor, return
exercises.motionHint: Hip hinge with hands behind head; torso lowers to parallel with floor; slight knee bend

exercises.name: Nordic Curls
exercises.label: Slowly lower torso
exercises.instruction: Kneeling, slowly lower torso toward floor, keeping back straight
exercises.description: Kneel with ankles secured (partner or strap). Keeping body straight from knees to head, slowly lower torso forward toward floor with control, then return to upright kneeling using hamstrings.
exercises.ghost: kneeling upright, body straight from knees to head
exercises.active: torso slowly lowers forward/back toward floor, controlled return
exercises.motionHint: Torso slowly lowers forward from kneeling; body stays in straight line; controlled return

exercises.name: Straight-Leg Deadlifts
exercises.label: Hip hinge with straight legs
exercises.instruction: Hip hinge with straight legs, reach toward floor, return
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, legs straight or micro-bend at knees. Hinge at hips, pushing butt back while lowering torso and reaching hands toward floor, keeping back flat. Return by driving hips forward.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, legs straight
exercises.active: torso hinges forward with straight legs, hands reach toward floor, return
exercises.motionHint: Hip hinge with straight legs; hands reach toward floor; back stays flat

exercises.name: Hamstring Stretch
exercises.label: Reach toward extended foot
exercises.instruction: Seated with one leg extended, reach toward foot, hold
exercises.description: Sit with one leg extended straight forward, other knee bent with foot on floor. Reach both hands toward the extended foot, hinging at hips to feel stretch in hamstring, hold, then release.
exercises.ghost: seated with one leg straight forward, other leg bent
exercises.active: torso folds forward over extended leg, reaching toward foot, hold
exercises.motionHint: Seated fold: torso hinges forward over extended leg; hands reach toward foot

exercises.name: Single-Leg Bridges
exercises.label: Lift hips with one leg extended
exercises.instruction: Bridge with one leg extended up, lift hips, lower
exercises.description: Lie on back with one knee bent and foot on floor, other leg extended straight up toward ceiling. Lift hips by driving through the grounded foot, hold at top, then lower with control.
exercises.ghost: on back with one knee bent/foot on floor, other leg extended up
exercises.active: hips lift and lower while one leg stays extended upward
exercises.motionHint: One knee bent foot on floor @ other leg extended up; hips lift and lower

exercises.name: Banded Walks
exercises.label: Side step with band
exercises.instruction: Slight squat position, step to the side, keep tension
exercises.description: Place mini-band around thighs or ankles. Start in slight squat with feet shoulder-width. Step laterally to one side maintaining tension on band and squat depth, then bring trailing leg to meet it. Repeat in both directions.
exercises.ghost: standing in slight squat, feet shoulder-width
exercises.active: one leg steps to the side, other follows, maintaining squat
exercises.motionHint: Side steps in slight squat; legs stay wide; minimal vertical motion

exercises.name: Fire Hydrants
exercises.label: Lift knee out to side
exercises.instruction: On all fours, lift one bent knee out to the side, return
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees in neutral position. Keeping knee bent at 90 degrees, lift one leg out to the side (external hip rotation) like a dog at a fire hydrant, then return to start without rotating pelvis.
exercises.ghost: neutral all-fours position
exercises.active: one bent knee lifts out to the side (external rotation at hip), return
exercises.motionHint: On hands and knees; bent knee lifts out to side in external rotation

exercises.name: Glute Kickbacks
exercises.label: Kick leg back and up
exercises.instruction: On all fours, kick one leg back and up, return
exercises.description: On hands and knees, extend one leg straight back and slightly upward, squeezing glute at top, then return knee toward chest without touching down if possible.
exercises.ghost: neutral all-fours position
exercises.active: one leg extends back and up, foot flexed, return
exercises.motionHint: On hands and knees; one leg extends straight back and up

exercises.name: Bird Dogs
exercises.label: Extend opposite arm and leg
exercises.instruction: On all fours, extend opposite arm forward and leg backward, return
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Simultaneously extend one arm forward and the opposite leg backward until both are straight and parallel to floor, keeping hips level and core braced. Return and alternate sides.
exercises.ghost: neutral all-fours position
exercises.active: one arm reaches forward, opposite leg reaches back, return to all-fours
exercises.motionHint: On hands and knees; one arm reaches forward @ opposite leg kicks back simultaneously

exercises.name: Planks
exercises.label: Hold forearm plank
exercises.instruction: Forearm plank, body in straight line, hold
exercises.description: Forearms on floor, elbows under shoulders, toes tucked under. Body forms straight line from head to heels. Engage core, glutes, and legs to hold position without sagging or piking hips.
exercises.ghost: forearm plank position, body in straight line
exercises.active: minimal motion (hold position), subtle body line indicator
exercises.motionHint: Forearm plank hold; body straight from head to heels; minimal motion

exercises.name: Side Planks
exercises.label: Hold side plank
exercises.instruction: Side body hold on forearm, hold
exercises.description: Lie on one side, propped on forearm with elbow under shoulder. Stack feet or place top foot in front for stability. Lift hips to form straight line from head to feet, hold while bracing core.
exercises.ghost: side plank position, body in straight line
exercises.active: minimal motion (hold position), subtle body line indicator
exercises.motionHint: Side body hold on forearm; body straight from head to feet; minimal motion

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilts
exercises.label: Tilt pelvis posteriorly
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, knees bent, gently tilt pelvis (flatten lower back)
exercises.description: Lie on back with knees bent and feet flat on floor. Gently tilt pelvis posteriorly by pressing lower back into floor (flatten lumbar curve), hold briefly, then release to neutral.
exercises.ghost: on back with knees bent, neutral pelvis
exercises.active: pelvis tilts posteriorly (lower back flattens to floor), return
exercises.motionHint: Supine with knees bent; pelvis tilts posteriorly flattening lower back to floor

exercises.name: Hollow Holds
exercises.label: Lift arms and legs, hold U-shape
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, lift arms, head, shoulders, and legs off floor, hold
exercises.description: Lie on back with arms extended overhead or by sides. Simultaneously lift head, shoulders, arms, and legs off the floor so lower back presses into floor, forming a slight U or banana shape. Hold while breathing steadily.
exercises.ghost: on back, arms and legs extended on floor
exercises.active: arms, head, shoulders, and legs lift off floor forming U-shape, hold
exercises.motionHint: Supine; arms, head, shoulders, and legs lift off floor forming a U-shape

exercises.name: Supermans
exercises.label: Lift arms and legs
exercises.instruction: Lie face down, lift arms, chest, and legs off floor simultaneously
exercises.description: Lie face down with arms extended forward or by sides and legs straight. Simultaneously lift chest, arms, and legs off the floor as high as comfortable while squeezing glutes and upper back, hold briefly, then lower with control.
exercises.ghost: lying face down, arms and legs extended
exercises.active: arms, chest, and legs lift off floor, hold briefly, lower
exercises.motionHint: Prone; arms, chest, and legs lift off floor simultaneously; glutes squeeze

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.label: Curl shoulders toward knees
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, knees bent, curl shoulders up toward knees
exercises.description: Lie on back with knees bent, feet flat. Hands behind head or crossed on chest. Curl shoulders and upper back off floor toward knees by contracting abs, lower back stays pressed into floor. Lower with control.
exercises.ghost: on back with knees bent, hands behind head
exercises.active: shoulders curl up toward knees, lower back stays on floor, return
exercises.motionHint: Supine with knees bent; shoulders curl up toward knees; lower back stays on floor

exercises.name: Quad Sets
exercises.label: Tighten quadriceps
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, leg straight, tighten quad muscle, hold, release
exercises.description: Lie on back with one leg straight and other knee bent or straight. Tighten the quadriceps muscle of the straight leg by pushing knee down into floor (or imagining it), hold 5-10 seconds, then release. Minimal visible movement but muscle contraction visible.
exercises.ghost: on back with one leg extended straight, slight bend in knee
exercises.active: quad muscle visibly tenses (subtle knee extension), minimal visible motion
exercises.motionHint: Supine with straight leg; quad tightens causing subtle knee extension

exercises.name: Straight Leg Raises
exercises.label: Lift straight leg up and down
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, one leg straight, lift up to 45 degrees, lower
exercises.description: Lie on back with one knee bent and foot flat on floor for stability. Other leg straight with foot flexed. Lift straight leg up to about 45 degrees or until thigh is level with bent knee, then lower slowly with control.
exercises.ghost: on back with one knee bent/foot on floor, other leg straight on floor
exercises.active: straight leg lifts up to ~45 degrees, lowers back down under control
exercises.motionHint: Supine with one leg bent; straight leg lifts to ~45 degrees then lowers

exercises.name: Step-Ups
exercises.label: Step up onto platform
exercises.instruction: Step one foot onto platform, drive up, step down, repeat
exercises.description: Stand facing a sturdy platform or step (6-12 inches). Step one foot fully onto the platform, drive through heel to stand tall on platform, then step the trailing foot up. Reverse: step down leading with same foot or alternate.
exercises.ghost: standing facing platform, both feet on ground
exercises.active: one foot steps up onto platform, other leg drives up, then step back down
exercises.motionHint: One foot steps up onto platform; other leg drives up; controlled step down

exercises.name: Wall Sits
exercises.label: Slide down wall to 90 degrees
exercises.instruction: Lean back against wall, slide down until knees at 90 degrees, hold
exercises.description: Stand with back against wall, feet shoulder-width about 2 feet from wall. Slide down wall by bending knees until thighs are parallel to floor (knees ~90 degrees). Hold position, then slide back up.
exercises.ghost: standing upright against wall
exercises.active: slide down wall into seated position (knees 90 degrees), hold briefly, return up
exercises.motionHint: Back against wall; slide down to 90 degree knee bend; hold then slide up

exercises.name: Terminal Knee Extensions
exercises.label: Extend knee against band
exercises.instruction: Stand with band around ankle, extend knee, return slowly
exercises.description: Stand facing away from anchor point with band looped around back of one ankle. Start with slight knee bend. Extend the knee fully against band resistance, squeezing quad at top, then return slowly to start position.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, slight knee bend
exercises.active: one knee extends fully against resistance, returns slowly; band shown as line
exercises.motionHint: Standing; one knee extends fully against band resistance; slow return

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.label: Lunge forward, stretch hip
exercises.instruction: Kneeling lunge, shift weight forward, feel hip stretch, hold
exercises.description: Start in half-kneeling position (one knee down, other foot forward). Keeping torso upright, shift hips forward until stretch is felt in front of back hip/thigh. Hold, then return or deepen gently.
exercises.ghost: kneeling lunge position (one knee down, other foot forward)
exercises.active: shift hips forward into deeper stretch, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Half-kneeling lunge; hips shift forward deepening the hip stretch

exercises.name: Figure-4 Stretch
exercises.label: Ankle over knee, press leg
exercises.instruction: Lie on back, cross one ankle over opposite knee, press leg forward
exercises.description: Lie on back. Cross one ankle over the opposite knee (figure-4). Gently press the crossed knee away from body or pull thigh toward chest to deepen stretch in outer hip/glute. Hold, then switch sides.
exercises.ghost: on back with one knee bent/foot on floor, other ankle crossed on knee
exercises.active: leg presses forward to deepen stretch, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Supine; ankle crosses opposite knee; leg presses forward for glute stretch

exercises.name: Hip Circles
exercises.label: Circle leg at hip
exercises.instruction: Stand on one leg, circle the other leg at the hip
exercises.description: Stand on one leg (hold support if needed). Lift other leg slightly off floor and trace controlled circles at the hip joint in both directions. Keep pelvis stable and core engaged.
exercises.ghost: standing on one leg, other leg slightly lifted
exercises.active: lifted leg traces circles at the hip joint, controlled motion
exercises.motionHint: Standing on one leg; opposite leg traces circles at the hip joint

exercises.name: Banded Hip Flexion
exercises.label: Drive knee up against band
exercises.instruction: Stand with band around ankle, drive knee upward, return
exercises.description: Stand sideways to band anchor with band around one ankle. Start with slight hip extension. Drive the banded knee up and forward against resistance in a marching motion, then return with control.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, band around one ankle
exercises.active: one knee drives up and forward against band resistance, return
exercises.motionHint: Standing with band around ankle; knee drives up and forward against resistance

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.label: Fold forward over front leg
exercises.instruction: Seated with one leg bent in front, other extended back, fold forward
exercises.description: From seated or all-fours transition, bring one leg forward into bent position (~90 degrees at knee), extend other leg straight back. Square hips, then fold torso forward over front shin, reaching arms out. Hold deep hip stretch.
exercises.ghost: seated with front leg bent at ~90 degrees, back leg extended behind
exercises.active: torso folds forward over front leg, deepening hip stretch, hold
exercises.motionHint: Seated; one leg bent forward at 90 degrees; torso folds forward over shin

exercises.name: 90-90 Stretch
exercises.label: Both legs at 90 degrees
exercises.instruction: Seated with both legs bent 90 degrees, rotate torso, hold
exercises.description: Sit with both legs bent at 90 degrees (one leg forward, one to the side like a pinwheel or 90-90 position). Keep front shin parallel to body or adjust for comfort. Rotate torso toward front leg, hold stretch, then return and switch orientation.
exercises.ghost: seated with both legs at 90 degrees (one forward, one to side)
exercises.active: torso rotates toward front leg, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Seated with both legs at 90 degrees; torso rotates toward front leg

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.label: Reach arms forward, sit back
exercises.instruction: Kneeling, sit back on heels, reach arms forward on floor, hold
exercises.description: Kneel on floor, big toes touching, knees wide or together. Sit hips back toward heels. Extend arms forward on floor, forehead can rest on mat. Breathe deeply into back and sides. Hold for relaxation and gentle stretch.
exercises.ghost: kneeling upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: fold forward, arms extend forward on floor, hips sit back toward heels, hold
exercises.motionHint: Kneeling; hips sit back toward heels; arms reach forward on floor

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.label: Lunge with thoracic rotation
exercises.instruction: Lunge forward, rotate torso toward front leg, reach arm up
exercises.description: From standing, step one foot forward into deep lunge (back knee may touch floor). Place hand inside front foot. Rotate torso toward front leg, reaching opposite arm up toward ceiling and looking up. Return hand to floor, step back or repeat.
exercises.ghost: deep lunge position, back knee on floor
exercises.active: torso rotates toward front leg, one arm reaches toward ceiling, return
exercises.motionHint: Deep lunge; torso rotates toward front leg; arm reaches toward ceiling

exercises.name: Thread the Needle
exercises.label: Thread arm under body
exercises.instruction: On all fours, reach one arm under body to opposite side, rotate
exercises.description: Start on hands and knees. Slide one arm under the opposite arm and through to the other side, allowing torso and head to rotate and shoulder to lower toward floor. Feel stretch in upper back/shoulder. Return and switch sides.
exercises.ghost: neutral all-fours position
exercises.active: one arm reaches under body to opposite side, torso rotates, return
exercises.motionHint: All fours; one arm reaches under body to opposite side; torso rotates

exercises.name: Seated Spinal Twist
exercises.label: Twist torso to one side
exercises.instruction: Seated with legs crossed, twist torso to one side, hold, repeat
exercises.description: Sit cross-legged or with one leg bent. Place one hand on opposite knee or thigh. Inhale to lengthen spine, exhale to twist torso toward the bent knee side. Use hand for gentle assist. Hold, breathe, then return slowly and switch.
exercises.ghost: seated cross-legged, hands at sides
exercises.active: torso rotates to one side, one hand on opposite knee, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Seated cross-legged; torso rotates to one side; hand on opposite knee

exercises.name: Standing Side Bend
exercises.label: Bend torso to the side
exercises.instruction: Stand with feet shoulder-width, reach one arm overhead, bend to side, hold
exercises.description: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart. Reach one arm overhead, palm facing in. Gently bend torso laterally to the opposite side, keeping hips stable and both feet grounded. Feel stretch along side body. Hold, return to center, switch sides.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: one arm reaches overhead, torso bends laterally to opposite side, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Standing; one arm reaches overhead; torso bends laterally to opposite side

exercises.name: Single-Leg Stance
exercises.label: Stand on one foot
exercises.instruction: Stand on one foot, hold balance, switch sides
exercises.description: Stand tall with feet together. Shift weight to one foot, lift opposite foot off floor (knee bent or straight). Hold balance for time or with eyes closed for challenge. Arms can be at sides or crossed. Subtle postural sway is normal.
exercises.ghost: standing upright on both feet
exercises.active: lift one foot off floor, balance on other foot, slight sway for realism
exercises.motionHint: Standing on one foot with slight postural sway; other foot lifted

exercises.name: Tandem Walk
exercises.label: Walk heel to toe
exercises.instruction: Walk in straight line, placing heel directly in front of toes
exercises.description: Stand at start of imaginary line. Walk forward placing heel of front foot directly touching toes of back foot with each step, like walking a tightrope. Arms at sides or out for balance. Focus on smooth, controlled steps.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: step forward with heel touching toes of back foot, repeat alternating
exercises.motionHint: Heel-to-toe walking in straight line; arms out for balance

exercises.name: Heel-to-Toe Stand
exercises.label: Stand with feet in tandem
exercises.instruction: Stand with one foot directly in front of the other, hold
exercises.description: Stand with one foot directly in front of the other so heel of front foot touches toes of back foot. Distribute weight evenly or slightly more on back foot. Hold balance, arms at sides or crossed. Switch foot order.
exercises.ghost: standing with feet in tandem position (one in front of other)
exercises.active: hold tandem stance, subtle sway for balance realism
exercises.motionHint: Standing with one foot directly in front of the other; subtle balance sway

exercises.name: Lateral Step-Overs
exercises.label: Step sideways over obstacle
exercises.instruction: Step sideways over low obstacle, alternate directions
exercises.description: Stand sideways to a low obstacle (cone, line, or imaginary). Step one leg laterally over the obstacle, then bring trailing leg over to meet it. Repeat back in opposite direction or continue laterally.
exercises.ghost: standing upright
exercises.active: step one leg over obstacle to side, bring other leg over, repeat back
exercises.motionHint: Step one leg sideways over obstacle; bring other leg over; repeat back

exercises.name: Marching
exercises.label: High knee march in place
exercises.instruction: March in place, lifting knees to hip height, pump arms
exercises.description: Stand tall. March in place by lifting knees alternately toward hip height (or comfortable height). Opposite arm swings forward with each knee lift. Maintain upright posture and core engagement. Can be done slow or with pace.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: alternating high knee lifts with opposite arm swing, continuous
exercises.motionHint: High knee march in place; opposite arm swings forward with each step

exercises.name: Pendulum Swings
exercises.label: Swing arm in circles
exercises.instruction: Bend forward, let arm hang, swing in circles, switch directions
exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width, hinge forward at hips with flat back (like starting a Romanian deadlift). Let one arm hang relaxed. Swing arm in large circles from shoulder, clockwise then counterclockwise. Switch arms.
exercises.ghost: standing bent forward at hips, one arm hanging down
exercises.active: arm swings in circles at shoulder, body stays bent forward
exercises.motionHint: Bent forward at hips; one arm dangles and swings in circles at shoulder

exercises.name: Band Pull-Aparts
exercises.label: Pull band apart horizontally
exercises.instruction: Hold band in front at shoulder height, pull apart, return
exercises.description: Stand tall holding resistance band or mini-band in both hands at shoulder height, arms extended forward, slight tension. Pull band apart by squeezing shoulder blades together and moving arms out to sides, then return to start with control.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms extended forward at shoulder height, holding band
exercises.active: arms pull band apart horizontally, squeeze shoulder blades, return
exercises.motionHint: Upright; arms extended forward; pull band apart; squeeze shoulder blades

exercises.name: Wall Slides
exercises.label: Slide arms up wall
exercises.instruction: Stand against wall, arms at 90 degrees, slide up, return
exercises.description: Stand with back flat against wall, feet 6-12 inches away. Arms in 'W' or goalpost position (elbows bent ~90 degrees, upper arms against wall). Slide arms up wall into 'Y' position (arms straight overhead), then slide back down to W.
exercises.ghost: standing against wall, arms in W position (elbows bent 90)
exercises.active: arms slide up wall into Y position, return to W
exercises.motionHint: Back against wall; arms in W position; slide up wall to Y position and return

exercises.name: Scapular Retractions
exercises.label: Squeeze shoulder blades
exercises.instruction: Stand with arms at sides, squeeze shoulder blades together, release
exercises.description: Stand tall with arms relaxed at sides or slight bend. Squeeze shoulder blades together (retraction) as if pinching a pencil between them, hold 2-5 seconds, then release. Can add slight external rotation of arms for more activation.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: shoulder blades squeeze together (arms pull back slightly), release
exercises.motionHint: Upright; squeeze shoulder blades together; arms pull back slightly

exercises.name: Doorway Stretch
exercises.label: Stretch chest in doorway
exercises.instruction: Stand in doorway, arms on door frame, lean forward, hold
exercises.description: Stand in a doorway. Place forearms on door frame at about shoulder height, elbows bent ~90 degrees. Lean chest forward through the doorway until stretch is felt across chest and front of shoulders. Hold, then step back to release.
exercises.ghost: standing in doorway, forearms on frame at shoulder height
exercises.active: lean forward through doorway, stretching chest, hold, return
exercises.motionHint: Arms on door frame at shoulder height; lean forward for chest stretch

exercises.name: Chest Opener
exercises.label: Clasp hands behind back, open chest
exercises.instruction: Stand with hands clasped behind back, straighten arms, open chest, hold
exercises.description: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width. Clasp hands behind back, interlace fingers or hold wrist. Straighten arms and gently lift hands away from body while rolling shoulders back and opening chest forward. Hold stretch, then release.
exercises.ghost: standing upright, arms at sides
exercises.active: hands clasp behind back, arms straighten, shoulders roll back, chest opens, hold
exercises.motionHint: Hands clasped behind back; arms straighten; shoulders roll back; chest opens

motionFields.posture: Which posture template to use as the base skeleton
motionFields.rest: Joint offsets applied at rest (starting pose differs from template)
motionFields.move: Joint deltas applied during animation (0 at rest, max at mid-cycle)
motionFields.highlight: Array of joint pairs to draw in the accent color during motion
motionFields.annotations: Labels, arrows, or arcs that follow animated joints

generator.jointDeltaFormat: { x: number, y: number } — relative pixel offset from template position
generator.animationCycle: p goes 0→1→0 via easeInOut over 72 frames at 24fps (3 second loop)
generator.notes: Add a motion definition to scripts/generate.js's MOTIONS object for each new exercise. The rest field sets the exercise-specific starting pose; the move field animates from there. Head position uses formula: INSTRUCTION_Y(58) + HEAD_R(10) + MARGIN(5) = 73, enforced by validate.js headClearance check.
